campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and the city's efforts to recruit and retain employees. The council also heard public comments on various matters and noted that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: Staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Public hearing under Government Code Section 3502
Boogie Festival this weekend
Public comments on council matters

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved an engineer's report and moved forward with a formal process that includes a public hearing and a vote scheduled for May 20th. The council also discussed whether Saratoga should become a charter city and reviewed different tax options that could generate revenue for the city.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report approval for the fiscal year
Public hearing and ordinance vote scheduled for May 20, 2026
Consideration of charter city status for Saratoga
Review of potential tax options and revenue estimates

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several spending and agreement decisions. The council approved donations, service contracts, a paving project, grant applications, and a list of capital projects for the coming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved a construction contract with O'Grady Paving for town infrastructure work
Reviewed March 2026 financial and investment reports
Accepted donation of an Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Authorized grant applications for statewide funding
Approved list of capital projects planned for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a planning meeting to organize upcoming agendas and update committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council reviewed the June 2 draft agenda and made decisions about which items need special timing and any waiver requirements.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 City Council meeting
June 2 draft agenda items and scheduling
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan update
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 26, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve previous meeting minutes, hear public comments from residents, and discuss upcoming special events happening in the city. The council also reviewed end-of-year survey results and received updates from various committees and city staff.
keyTopics: Public comments and feedback from Mountain View residents
Upcoming special events scheduled for the city
End-of-year survey results and resident feedback
Committee reports and staff updates

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 18, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council met to approve meeting minutes from a December 2025 subcommittee session and reviewed grant applications for community events and neighborhood projects in the spring funding cycle. The council heard public comment on which local organizations and initiatives should receive funding.
keyTopics: Approval of December 2025 Community Event and Neighborhood Grant Program Subcommittee minutes
Spring 2026 Community Events and Neighborhood Grant Program applications under review
Public comment period on which community projects should receive city funding

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 1, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council's Legislative Review Committee met to approve minutes from their April 6, 2026 meeting and hear from residents on any topics within the committee's authority. The meeting included a legislative update, though the full agenda appears incomplete in the provided document.
keyTopics: Approval of April 6, 2026 Committee meeting minutes
Public comment period (3 minutes per speaker)
Legislative update

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's City Council held a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting on June 1, 2026. The meeting was held in-person but residents could also participate remotely via Zoom or phone.
keyTopics: Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meetings
Remote participation options (Zoom and phone dial-in available)
Written public comment submission process via email

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to address housing and community development funding plans, review requests from individual council members for new work items, and consider changes to how the city fills council vacancies. The council also approved meeting minutes and discussed the upcoming meeting schedule.
keyTopics: Updates to the 2025-2030 housing and community development plan
Council members' requests for new projects and agenda items
Changes to the process for filling vacant council seats
Approval of previous meeting records and next meeting preview

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 6, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to review planning projects, public safety operations, and city fees and infrastructure spending. Key discussions included updates on planning and transportation services, police and fire department operations, new municipal fees for 2027, and the city's capital improvement plan.
keyTopics: Planning and Development Services updates
Police, Fire, and Emergency Services reports
FY 2027 Municipal Fee Schedule changes
Capital Improvement Program and infrastructure projects
